papers.title_en: Artificial Intelligence-based Algorithm for Predicting Outcomes in Early-stage Lung Cancer (AI PREDICTION): An Annotation-free Imaging AI Study
papers.tldr: 本研究针对临床I期非小细胞肺癌预后评估中传统因素主观性强的问题，开发并验证了一种名为AI PREDICTION的无需人工标注的影像AI算法。该研究通过深度学习技术直接从影像数据中提取特征，旨在为早期肺癌患者提供更客观、准确的术后预后预测，为肺癌精准医疗提供了自动化评估的新方案。
papers.abstract_en: Objective Surgery remains the standard treatment for clinical stage I non–small celllung cancer (NSCLC). Conventional prognostic factors are often subjective andvariable, highlighting the need for objective prediction. We developed and validated …

papers.title_en: Leveraging co-attention-based interactions between pathology and radiology for pan-cancer survival prediction
papers.tldr: 本研究提出一种基于协同注意力机制（co-attention）的多模态融合框架，旨在整合宏观放射学影像与微观病理学图像进行泛癌生存预测。通过捕捉两种模态间的复杂交互作用，该方法提供了肿瘤的多尺度视图，有效克服了单一模态在预后评估中的局限性，为精准肿瘤学研究提供了新的技术手段。
papers.abstract_en: Background Integrating macroscopic radiology with microscopic pathology canprovide a multiscale view of tumors, thereby advancing oncology research. However,utilizing the interplay between the two for survival analysis, particularly across …

papers.title_en: Zero-Shot Lung Disease Detection Using Radiological Symptomatic Descriptors and Pretrained Neural Networks
papers.tldr: 针对胸部X射线影像中放射学特征与临床文本描述对齐困难的挑战，本文提出DVLM框架。该框架通过双头视觉语言模型结合神经记忆机制，利用放射学症状描述符和预训练神经网络实现零样本肺部疾病检测，显著提升了模型在未见疾病类别上的识别性能与泛化能力。
papers.abstract_en: Aligning radiological features with clinical text descriptions remains a key challengefor zero-shot disease recognition in chest radiography. We propose DVLM (Dual-Head Vision-Language Model with Neural Memory), a framework combining Vision …

papers.title_en: AXIS-Net: Asymmetric attention and Scale-Integrated fusion network for robust breast lesion segmentation in ultrasound images
papers.tldr: 针对超声图像中噪声大、对比度低及病变边界不规则导致的分割难题，本文提出AXIS-Net。该网络采用编码器-解码器架构，通过引入非对称注意力机制和尺度集成跳跃连接，有效提升了多尺度特征的融合能力与病变区域的定位精度，在乳腺病变分割任务中展现出优异的鲁棒性和准确性。
papers.abstract_en: Accurate breast lesion segmentation in ultrasound is hindered by noise, low contrast,and irregular boundaries. In this paper, we propose AXIS-Net (Asymmetric Attentionand Scale-Integrated Skip connections Network), an encoder–decoder framework …

papers.title_en: Thought Graph Traversal for Test-time Scaling in Chest X-ray VLLMs
papers.tldr: 本文针对胸部X射线（CXR）多模态大模型推理能力提升的需求，提出了一种基于“思维图遍历”的测试时缩放（Test-time Scaling）方法。该方法无需额外训练，通过在推理阶段构建并遍历思维路径图，探索多种逻辑推理可能，从而显著增强模型在医学影像诊断中的推理性能和准确性，为医疗大模型的高效优化提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Test-time scaling offers a promising way to improve the reasoning performance ofvision-language large models (VLLMs) without additional training. In this paper, weexplore a simple but effective approach for applying test-time scaling to chest X-ray …

papers.title_en: RIHA: Report-Image Hierarchical Alignment for Radiology Report Generation
papers.tldr: 放射科报告生成（RRG）旨在通过自动生成诊断报告来减轻放射科医生的工作负担，但面临图像与文本跨模态对齐的挑战。本文提出RIHA框架，通过引入报告与图像的层级对齐机制，在不同粒度上捕捉视觉特征与医学术语之间的关联，显著提升了生成报告的准确性与临床一致性。
papers.abstract_en: Radiology report generation (RRG) has emerged as a promising approach toalleviate radiologists' workload and reduce human errors by automaticallygenerating diagnostic reports from medical images. A key challenge in RRG is …

papers.title_en: A Regularized Backbone-Level Cross-Modal Interaction Framework for Stable Temporal Reasoning in Video-Language Models
papers.tldr: 针对第一人称视角视频理解中存在的观测稀疏、噪声多及时间歧义等导致的稳定性不足问题，本文提出了一种正则化的骨干级跨模态交互框架。该框架通过在视频-语言模型的骨干网络中引入正则化机制，增强了跨模态交互的稳定性，从而实现了更稳健的时间推理。研究为解决第一人称视频理解中的不确定性提供了理论支撑和有效的技术方案。
papers.abstract_en: Deep learning approaches for egocentric video understanding often lack a principledtheoretical treatment of stability, particularly when dealing with the sparse, noisy, andtemporally ambiguous observations characteristic of first-person imaging. In this …

papers.title_en: Preoperative Prediction of Axillary Lymph Node Metastasis in Breast Cancer Using a Three-tier MRI Radiomics Model with Nested Cross-validation
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在提高乳腺癌术前腋窝淋巴结（ALN）转移预测的准确性。研究者开发并验证了一个三层预测模型，该模型整合了临床信息、定性MRI特征以及基于MRI的影像组学特征。通过采用嵌套交叉验证方法，研究证明了该多维度模型在识别ALN转移方面具有显著的诊断价值，为临床制定个性化手术和治疗方案提供了可靠的无创评估工具。
papers.abstract_en: Rationale and Objectives To develop and validate a three-tier model incorporatingclinical, qualitative magnetic resonance imaging (MRI), and radiomics features forpreoperative prediction of axillary lymph node (ALN) metastasis in breast cancer …

papers.title_en: Stable or not? unraveling the reliability of radiomic features in 4d-computed tomography in early-stage non-small cell lung cancer
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了早期非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）中四维计算机断层扫描（4D-CT）影像组学特征的可靠性。尽管4D-CT是放疗规划的金标准，但其在影像组学中的应用仍待挖掘。研究提出了一种可复现且可扩展的框架，旨在评估不同呼吸时相下影像组学特征的稳定性，为筛选稳健的生物标志物提供了重要参考，从而提升临床决策的准确性。
papers.abstract_en: Aim Four-dimensional computed tomography (4D-CT) is the gold standard forradiotherapy planning in non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC), yet its use inradiomics remains underexplored. This study proposes a reproducible, scalable …

papers.title_en: Projection Guided Personalized Federated Learning for Low Dose CT Denoising
papers.tldr: 本研究针对低剂量CT（LDCT）在不同医疗机构间存在的协议相关噪声和伪影差异，提出了一种投影引导的个性化联邦学习（pFL）框架。该方法在保护患者隐私的前提下，通过引入投影域信息引导模型优化，有效解决了跨机构数据异构性问题，显著提升了LDCT图像的去噪质量和个性化适配能力。
papers.abstract_en: Low-dose CT (LDCT) reduces radiation exposure but introduces protocol-dependentnoise and artifacts that vary across institutions. While federated learning enablescollaborative training without centralizing patient data, existing methods personalize …

papers.title_en: CAMD: Coverage-Aware Multimodal Decoding for Efficient Reasoning of Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.tldr: 针对多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在推理过程中存在的计算量与任务难度不匹配问题，本文提出了CAMD（覆盖感知多模态解码）。该方法通过实证分析识别计算冗余，引入覆盖感知机制动态调整解码过程中的计算资源分配。实验表明，CAMD在保持高性能的同时显著提升了多模态推理效率，为实现高效能MLLM提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Recent advances in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shownimpressive reasoning capabilities across vision-language tasks, yet still face thechallenge of compute-difficulty mismatch. Through empirical analyses, we identify …

papers.title_en: Automatic Configuration of LLM Post-Training Pipelines
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型（LLM）后训练过程中监督微调（SFT）与强化学习（RL）阶段配置困难的问题，提出了一种自动化配置框架。由于后训练流水线具有高维异构且阶段强耦合的特点，在现实计算预算下手动调优极具挑战。该方法通过系统化搜索优化配置，显著提升了模型性能，为高效构建高质量LLM提供了自动化解决方案。
papers.abstract_en: LLM post-training pipelines that combine supervised fine-tuning and reinforcementlearning are difficult to configure under realistic compute budgets: the configurationspace is high-dimensional and heterogeneous, stages are strongly coupled, and …

papers.title_en: ForestPrune: High-ratio Visual Token Compression for Video Multimodal Large Language Models via Spatial-Temporal Forest Modeling
papers.tldr: 针对视频多模态大语言模型在处理视频时面临的巨大计算和内存开销，本文提出了ForestPrune。该方法通过创新的时空森林建模技术，对视频视觉Token进行高效剪枝。ForestPrune能够在保持模型理解能力的同时实现极高的压缩比，有效解决了现有压缩方法在视频任务中难以兼顾高压缩率与性能的问题，为长视频理解提供了高效的解决方案。
papers.abstract_en: Due to the great saving of computation and memory overhead, token compressionhas become a research hot-spot for MLLMs and achieved remarkable progress inimage-language tasks. However, for the video, existing methods still fall short of high …

papers.title_en: VISion On Request: Enhanced VLLM efficiency with sparse, dynamically selected, vision-language interactions
papers.tldr: 针对大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）中视觉标记减少导致的性能瓶颈，本文提出了 VISOR。该方法通过稀疏且动态选择的视觉-语言交互，在不损失关键信息的前提下提升了模型效率。VISOR 允许模型根据需求动态访问视觉特征，从而在保持高性能的同时显著降低计算开销，为高效多模态学习提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Existing approaches for improving the efficiency of Large Vision-Language Models(LVLMs) are largely based on the concept of visual token reduction. This approach,however, creates an information bottleneck that impairs performance, especially on …

papers.title_en: Perturbation: A simple and efficient adversarial tracer for representation learning in language models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对深度语言模型中语言表示定位困难的问题，提出了一种名为Perturbation的简单且高效的对抗性追踪方法。该方法通过引入对抗性扰动来探测模型内部的表示机制，旨在克服现有分析方法在复杂性和准确性上的局限。研究证明了该方法在识别模型内部语言特征方面的有效性，为理解语言模型的内部工作原理提供了新的工具和视角。
papers.abstract_en: Linguistic representation learning in deep neural language models (LMs) has beenstudied for decades, for both practical and theoretical reasons. However, findingrepresentations in LMs remains an unsolved problem, in part due to a dilemma …

papers.title_en: Seeing Like Radiologists: Context-and Gaze-Guided Vision-Language Pretraining for Chest X-rays
papers.tldr: 本研究针对现有医学视觉语言预训练模型忽视放射科医生诊断流程的问题，提出了一种结合临床上下文和眼动追踪（Gaze）信息的预训练框架。通过模拟医生在阅片时的视觉推理过程，该方法有效提升了模型对胸部X光片的理解能力，为构建更符合临床实践的医学AI模型提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Despite recent advances in medical vision-language pretraining, existing models stillstruggle to capture the diagnostic workflow: radiographs are typically treated ascontext-agnostic images, while radiologists' gaze--a crucial cue for visual reasoning …

papers.title_en: MUST: Modality-Specific Representation-Aware Transformer for Diffusion-Enhanced Survival Prediction with Missing Modality
papers.tldr: 本研究针对临床中多模态医学数据缺失导致的生存预测难题，提出了MUST框架。该框架结合了模态特定表示感知的Transformer与扩散模型，旨在增强缺失模态下的特征表示。通过扩散增强技术，MUST能够有效处理不完整数据，提升了精准肿瘤学中的生存预测准确性，为临床部署提供了更具鲁棒性的解决方案。
papers.abstract_en: Accurate survival prediction from multimodal medical data is essential for precisiononcology, yet clinical deployment faces a persistent challenge: modalities arefrequently incomplete due to cost constraints, technical limitations, or retrospective …

papers.title_en: Towards GUI Agents: Vision-Language Diffusion Models for GUI Grounding
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了离散扩散视觉语言模型（DVLMs）在图形用户界面（GUI）定位任务中的应用，旨在挑战长期由自回归（AR）模型主导的现状。通过引入扩散机制，该模型能够更有效地将自然语言指令映射到具体的界面元素上。实验表明，该方法在GUI定位精度和效率上具有显著优势，为开发高性能GUI智能体提供了新的技术路径。
papers.abstract_en: Autoregressive (AR) vision-language models (VLMs) have long dominatedmultimodal understanding, reasoning, and graphical user interface (GUI) grounding.Recently, discrete diffusion vision-language models (DVLMs) have shown strong …

papers.title_en: Mitigating the Reasoning Tax in Vision-Language Fine-Tuning with Input-Adaptive Depth Aggregation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对视觉语言模型（VLM）在指令微调过程中出现的“推理税”问题（即感知能力提升但推理能力下降），提出了一种输入自适应深度聚合方法。该方法通过动态调整模型深度，在增强视觉感知能力的同时，有效保留了模型的逻辑推理性能，为优化VLM的后训练过程提供了高效的解决方案。
papers.abstract_en: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on visual instruction data often improves perceptualcapabilities in vision-language models (VLMs) while degrading reasoningperformance, creating a persistent reasoning tax during post-training. We investigate …

papers.title_en: Learning to Predict Future-Aligned Research Proposals with Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型在辅助科研构思中难以自动评估创新性和合理性的挑战，提出了一种预测“未来对齐”科研提案的方法。通过利用历史数据模拟未来研究趋势，该方法能够量化评估模型生成的提案是否符合科学发展方向，为自动化科研评估提供了新视角，显著提升了辅助科研决策的效率与准确性。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to assist ideation in research,but evaluating the quality of LLM-generated research proposals remains difficult:novelty and soundness are hard to measure automatically, and large-scale human …

papers.title_en: MEDIC-AD: Towards Medical Vision-Language Model's Clinical Intelligence
papers.tldr: 本研究针对当前医疗视觉语言模型（VLM）在病灶检测、症状追踪及视觉可解释性方面存在的不足，提出了 MEDIC-AD 框架。该框架旨在将 VLM 的广泛知识转化为临床可操作的智能，通过增强模型的定位与解释能力，提升了其在实际医疗影像分析中的应用价值，为实现更具临床智能的医疗 AI 迈出了重要一步。
papers.abstract_en: Lesion detection, symptom tracking, and visual explainability are central to real-worldmedical image analysis, yet current medical Vision-Language Models (VLMs) stilllack mechanisms that translate their broad knowledge into clinically actionable …

papers.title_en: Project Imaging-X: A Survey of 1000+ Open-Access Medical Imaging Datasets for Foundation Model Development
papers.tldr: 本研究推出了 Project Imaging-X，旨在解决医疗影像基础模型开发中数据获取与整合的难题。通过对全球超过1000个开放获取的医疗影像数据集进行系统性调研和分类，该项目为研究人员提供了一个大规模、多样化且高质量的数据资源库，极大地推动了医疗人工智能领域通用基础模型的发展与应用。
papers.abstract_en: Foundation models have demonstrated remarkable success across diverse domainsand tasks, primarily due to the thrive of large-scale, diverse, and high-qualitydatasets. However, in the field of medical imaging, the curation and assembling of …
